memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-01 — Midday (First Routine of June)

**Iran REVERSAL:** Iran suspended US nuclear talks (citing Israel Lebanon/Gaza actions). WTI +8% to $94. Complete reversal of May 29 ceasefire narrative. Lesson: geopolitical catalysts can reverse intraday. Portfolio must be positioned for multiple scenarios.

**PLTR 13% weekly breakout:** PLTR surged from ~$138 (May 26) to $160 (June 1). Our May 29 limit at $138.62 was already well below market by end of May 29 session. Lesson: for momentum breakouts, do NOT anchor to prior-session close prices. Use ask×1.005 at time of execution — if stock has moved materially, update the limit. The prior PLTR limit planning was stale by Friday's close.

**Iran escalation = PLTR tailwind:** Defense AI spending increases with geopolitical risk. This is a unique positive correlation that benefits PLTR specifically and should be tracked as a macro modifier for defense AI names going forward.

**3 morning routines missed on June 1:** Pre-Market, Market-Open, Mid-Morning all silent failures. The cron scheduler is still not firing intraday routines consistently. Midday was first to fire. This is the 4th or 5th week of this infrastructure failure. API is also still blocked (25th consecutive session). The portfolio is running on 97% cash with massive opportunity cost piling up.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **IRAN REVERSAL (dominant):** Iran suspended US nuclear talks citing Israel Lebanon/Gaza actions. WTI crude +8% to $94. Brent +7% to $97. Reverses May 29 ceasefire narrative entirely.
- **NVDA Computex (June 1):** Jensen Huang unveiled RTX Spark (AI PC superchip) and Vera CPUs. NVDA +2.1% to $220.67. Confirms AI hardware investment cycle intact.
- **S&P 500 ~7,587 (+0.09%):** Essentially flat. Dow -0.39% (rate-sensitive). Nasdaq +0.30% (tech resilient). Russell -0.85% (small-cap risk-off on oil/inflation).
- **PLTR $160 (+13% weekly):** Q1 FY2026 $1.633B +85% YoY. Defense AI demand boom. Iran escalation = more defense spending. Score upgraded to 8.17.
- **MU $971 (+5.1%):** HBM4 demand accelerating. Up +303% YTD per reporting.
- **AMD $516:** Slightly below May 29 ATH $518. Constructive. NVDA Computex = indirect AI chip demand confirmation.
- **API blockage (25th consecutive day):** Same root cause. Operator manual execution required.
